text: Integrate AI directly into your game development workflow with Unity MCP. This tool uses the Model Context Protocol to give AI assistants the power to manage assets and control scenes within the Unity Editor. Explore the repository here: https://t.co/ArCMTxlIl6

urls.title: GitHub - CoplayDev/unity-mcp: Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.
